app.brandCopy: One shared frontend, one shared API, and a Rust-native AIForge-style generation pipeline.

overview.heroTitle: Web and desktop modes stay on the same Vue + Axum surface.
overview.heroCopy: The Rust core owns configuration, templates, articles, retrieval, and draft generation. The frontend stays focused on editing, previewing, and orchestration.

implementedItems.two: Config bundle read and write with defaults
implementedItems.three: Template CRUD and HTML placeholder rendering
implementedItems.five: Rust-native search, reference retrieval, and draft generation

constraintItems.one: WeChat publish flow is intentionally deferred
constraintItems.two: Tauri shell is still a host layer to complete later
constraintItems.three: Search mode depends on external network reachability

toggles.autoPublish: Auto publish when a future adapter is available

sections.uiDescription: These are the three UI settings currently aligned with AIWriteX. Theme applies immediately across the web app, window mode changes the workspace layout, and design theme affects editor and preview surfaces.
sections.themeHelp: The application shell updates immediately before saving.
sections.windowModeHelp: Standard mode centers the workspace. Maximized mode stretches the layout to the full browser width.
sections.designThemeHelp: Follow system syncs editor and preview colors with the OS theme. Default keeps a light design surface.
sections.imageModelsDescription: Image models are managed in a list. Create and edit actions use a modal.
sections.imageModelsEmpty: No image model yet. Use the action above to add one.
sections.imageApiDescription: This follows the current AIWriteX image API shape and lets you switch between Picsum random images and Alibaba Wanx.
sections.imageApiKeyHelpReadonly: Random images do not require an API key
sections.imageApiKeyHelp: Enter the image generation API key
sections.imageModelHelpReadonly: Random images do not require a model
sections.imageModelHelp: Enter the image generation model name
sections.customLlmDescription: LLM models are shown in a list. Create and edit actions use a modal.
sections.llmModelsEmpty: No LLM model yet. Use the action above to add one.
sections.publishPlatformsDescription: Each platform keeps its own publish URL, account details, cookies, and content rules.
sections.publishPlatformsEmpty: No publish platform yet. Use the action above to add one.

templates.dragHint: Drag a template card onto a category to move it.
templates.browserDescription: This area follows the AIWriteX template workflow: category browsing, direct actions, search, and drag-and-drop moves.
templates.searchPlaceholder: Search by template name, category, or path
templates.emptyState: No template yet. Create a category first, then add templates under it.
templates.searchEmpty: No template matched the current search keyword.
templates.editorDescription: Edit HTML placeholders on the left and verify the rendered result on the right.
templates.editorHint: Pick a template from the list to start editing.
templates.previewEmpty: The current template has no previewable content yet.
templates.previewSampleSummary: This is a summary generated from sample placeholder data.
templates.previewSampleParagraphOne: The preview panel replaces placeholders with sample values so we can inspect layout and typography quickly.
templates.previewSampleParagraphTwo: Save after editing to keep the latest template content in the shared workspace.
templates.deleteCategoryConfirm: Delete category "{name}" and every template inside it?

articles.title: Saved articles
articles.emptyState: Generated articles appear here after the generation task saves output.

generation.title: Generate article drafts
generation.workshopSubtitle: Enter a topic and wake up unlimited ideas
generation.workshopSubtitleReference: Reference mode on, draft with source guidance
generation.topicPlaceholder: Enter a writing topic, or leave blank to pick a hot topic automatically...
generation.logsEmpty: Start a generation task and the runtime logs will stream here.

fields.saveOutput: Save output into the article workspace

generation.referencePlaceholder: Leave empty to use search mode
generation.emptyState: Create a task to generate a Rust-composed draft from search or direct reference URLs.

frontendItems.two: `src/router/index.ts` defines web and desktop shared routes
frontendItems.three: `src/stores/*` own API-backed state for config, templates, articles, and generation
frontendItems.four: `src/host/*` keeps host-specific behavior behind a small bridge

backendItems.one: `postpub-types` shares DTOs between API and core
backendItems.two: `postpub-core` owns workspace files, retrieval, template rendering, and article generation
backendItems.three: `postpub-api` exposes the Axum HTTP layer and generation task manager
backendItems.four: `apps/web-launcher` starts the shared service for browser access

aiforge.searchValue: Google News RSS to normalized search results
aiforge.referenceValue: Direct URL fetch to HTML extraction to source summaries
aiforge.draftValue: Rust composition to markdown or html output to article save

implementedItems.four: Background generation tasks with SSE updates
implementedItems.five: Shared frontend and backend test coverage for implemented flows

deferredItems.three: More advanced model-based drafting beyond deterministic Rust composition
